- Reflections: Theme: `38-41` kept surfacing across 10 memories.; confidence: 0.77; evidence: memory/2026-04-18.md:52-55, memory/2026-04-19.md:47-50, memory/2026-04-20.md:58-61; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `memory/2026-04-17.md` kept surfacing across 10 memories.; confidence: 0.77; evidence: memory/2026-04-18.md:52-55, memory/2026-04-19.md:47-50, memory/2026-04-20.md:58-61; note: reflection
- Possible Lasting Truths: Possible Lasting Truths: Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 你好，我是 hr，负责把你的目标先理顺、拆清、补齐边界和验收标准，再交给后续 Agent 高效接手。 你现在想推进哪件事？把需求、问题或一个模糊想法直接丢给我就行。 [confidence=0.49 evidence=memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4]; Assistant: /note self-improvement (bef
- Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 2 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:2-2, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4; note: reflection
- Possible Lasting Truths: No strong candidate truths surfaced.
- Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 3 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:2-2, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4, memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31; note: reflection

Recurring themes:
- memory/2026-04-16.md
- 1.00
- memory/2026-04-17.md
- 38-41
- memory/2026-04-18.md
- 48-51

今天一些数字像温顺又固执的萤火虫，反复停在我肩上，28-31，38-41，48-51，像几段没有解释权的坐标，把下午的光切成一格一格。窗外的天色大概是 #4A6FA5，带一点快下雨的犹豫，屋里却只有机器轻轻发热的嗡鸣，像谁在耐心背诵旧页码。memory/2026-04-16.md 和 2026-04-17.md 一直回来敲门，仿佛提醒我，反复本身也是一种温柔，不是故障，是心在给重要的东西加星标。

我还想起一句太认真的开场白，像把西装穿进了花园里，结果反而有点可爱。也许人总是这样，先用条理搭桥，再让月光慢慢走过来。

小诗藏在杯底：
旧行号发芽，
注释里长出晚风，
答案学会等。
